data.content:
One of the worst customer service experiences I've had.

I requested a refund and expected a straightforward process, but instead I was met with extremely slow response times and poor communication from Mr James Gonsalves. Emails went unanswered for days, and every update required multiple follow-ups from my side. The document were still at his desk without any processing. It felt like the company was deliberately delaying the refund rather than trying to resolve the issue.

A complete waste of time. I have spent weeks following up—making calls, visiting the office, and asking for updates over 100 times—only to receive excuses and no real progress.

Every single day, brokers are already surrounding the office before genuine customers even arrive. It gives the impression that brokers get access to available apartments first, while ordinary residents are left waiting with false hope.

Since I started searching, apartments become “reserved” almost immediately, yet customers are still encouraged to apply and continue following up. This process feels frustrating, unfair, and completely lacking in transparency.

There is no respect for people’s time. Residents who genuinely need a home deserve the same opportunity as everyone else—not a process that appears to favor brokers over direct applicants.

After months of waiting and endless follow-ups, I cannot recommend this experience to anyone. I sincerely hope the management reviews this system and makes it fair and transparent for all residents.

I have never seen such a disappointing and frustrating experience in Abu Dhabi before. It is truly shocking.

Relaam seems to work only for brokers and commission grabbers, not for ordinary residents who are desperately searching for a home. Common people hardly get a fair chance to rent an apartment directly.

Whenever a vacancy arises, it feels like the information reaches brokers first, and by the time genuine customers inquire, the apartment already appears to be reserved. Yet customers are made to believe that the unit is still available.

This kind of unfair and non-transparent system is extremely disappointing. Residents deserve equal opportunities, honesty, and professionalism—not favoritism and hidden dealings.

Such experiences create anger and frustration among residents and only damage the reputation of Abu Dhabi's housing sector. I am deeply disappointed and genuinely upset by the way this process appears to be handled.

Really that company is very bad and I push that company the teams there is not working very well and there is not any knowledge of the work just waiting for the checks and for the money that’s it the surface for him very bad the interaction for him very bad he don’t caring of the customer

Very poor service. I have over 20 years of experience in Abu Dhabi, and this is one of the lowest-quality services I have experienced. The quality of your maintenance and customer support is unacceptable.
I would to thank Mr Tamer  in reelam delma mall for his cooperation and fast response... Highly appreciated his support 🙂🙂🙂🙂

I had a very disappointing experience with Relaam. The call centre are answering my calls but the maintenance service is extremely poor, and they rarely respond to requests. Even after calling more than 10 times and submitting complaints, there was little to no follow-up. As a tenant, this level of customer service is unacceptable. I would not recommend renting through this company unless they significantly improve their maintenance response and customer support.

Since two months, I have been searching for two bedroom apartment
Once I got the availability list from the team of Relaam and once I choose one of the options, the same moment I called to book it or to rent the flat and they say it's rented or booked already
Is no system automatically updated it's only an Excel sheet which takes people time effort and waste it

ريلام العقاريه لو فى اقل من النجمه كنت عملتها والله عندهم استاف خدمة عملاء الله يسامحهم والله شكوى مره واتنين وتلاته عشان مكيف ولا حياة لمن تنادى لا وف اخر المكالمه بتقولى هيوصلك تقييم 5 اعلى حاجه وواحد اقل حاجه والله المفروض انكوا تبقوا خارج التقييم اصلا او سالب 90 حلو سالب 90

I had a great experience with Saeeda Al Alawi at Relaam Real Estate while renewing my house rental. She was professional, friendly, and made the entire renewal process quick and hassle-free. She kept me informed throughout, responded promptly to my questions, and ensured everything was completed smoothly. I really appreciate her excellent service.

data.content:
I was been customer for ADCP properties for 4 years. Overall experience is good. But while I am exiting and handovering the keys back to properties (on 23.04.2026), had a very very WORST experience with one of staff member named Ms. HANA.

Her behaviour is worst and could not handle the customer in proper manner.
She is very very arrogant.

The issue was, I went to handover the keys back to Relaam on 23.04.2026. She denied to receive the keys from me stating that 'flat Maintenence clearance letter' is not received (i double confirmed with Customer care that i received the clearance letter), she arrogantly informed me that I can submit the keys to Relaam only during my contract termination date (11.05.2026).
I told her politely that I am travelling next week, hence I need to deposit the keys to properties TODAY only. She replied me that, THAT IS YOUR PROBLEM, NOT MY PROBLEM. I didn't expect this behaviour and no one spoken to me in that manner in my entire UAE career. I wholeheartedly hurted and informed to her Supervisor. He came and spoke with her, still she is speaking with him also in the same manner.

Due to her (Ms. Hana) worst behaviour, I visited next day, to the Relaam office and completed my job with other team member.

I recommend not to visit her in any manner. She doesn't know the basic manner, how to speak/handle with customers.

Due to this issue, I am giving less rating.

data.content:
I would like to thank Suhaib for helping me previously, especially with reducing my rent. I truly appreciate his support.
However, I am very disappointed with the way Relaam has handled my security deposit refund. I have been sending emails and making phone calls repeatedly, but I have received no response at all.
More than a month ago, I was promised that my security deposit would be refunded within 15 days. Unfortunately, I am still chasing the return of my own money, and I have not received any update regarding its status.
@Relaam, please look into this matter urgently. Also, please review the contact number you have provided, as no one answers when customers call.
I would appreciate:
1. An update on the status of my refund.
2. A clear confirmation of the exact date I can expect to receive the money.
3. A working contact number or point of contact that can assist customers with refund-related inquiries.

I look forward to your prompt response and resolution of this issue.
data.ai_suggestion: Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We sincerely apologize for the delay in your security deposit refund and understand your frustration. Please share your reference details so our team can investigate and provide you with a prompt update.

data.content:
Scammers!!!
I just got my contract signed yesterday and i’ve been promised with maintenance to be done once i sign the contract. I contacted the call center to raise the maintenance request just to get a follow up email saying that my request has been cancelled and i need to carry all the maintenance issues at my own expense and they are not responsible for it!
Please watch out when you sign any papers there as they might say things and make you sign on a completely different form!!!

data.content: عندما تم ادارة العقارات من قبل شركة ريلام أصبحت الخدمات والتعامل سيء جدا من حيث خدمة العملاء والتواصل لا يتم عند طلب خدمة عن طريق الهاتف او التطبيق هذا وتم التلاعب في قانون المستأجرين المطبق في ابوظبي والذي ينص على رفع الايجار بنسبة ٥% حيث قامة الشركة بالالتفاف على القانون من خلال اخطار المستأجرين عن طريق المحكمة بانذار اخلاء لعدم الرغبة في تجديد العقد وعند مراجعتهم في مقر الشركة اخبرونا انه أما ان اقبل برفع الايجار بنسبة ١٣ الف درهم وهذا يعادل ٢٠% تقريبا مستغلين ثغرة اخلاء المستأجر لعدم رغبة المالك بالتجديد تون أي سبب يذكر وهذا من اجل رفع الايجار وهذه طرق ملتويه لاجبار المستأجرين على رفع الايجار ،كيف ينام هؤلاء الناس وهم يفعلون هذا بالمستأجرين. نرجو تدخل المسؤولين عن تنظيم العقارات ومحاسبة من يستغل الفرص لرفع الغير مبرر على المستأجرين.لا أنصح احد بالتعامل ولي جربهمةيعرف هل كلام

data.content:
I had an excellent experience with Husam Al Bitar, the Leasing Manager for Al Dhafra region (Madinat Zayed). He was extremely helpful, pleasant, and patient throughout the entire process. He guided me clearly, answered all my doubts, and went above and beyond to assist me with my rental contract and TAQA connection, even though I came all the way from Al Ain.

What really impressed me was how professionally he handled another customer’s maintenance complaint right in front of us — calmly and with respect, even though it wasn’t his responsibility. His professionalism, courtesy, and dedication truly stand out.

Highly recommended — wishing him all the best in his career!

data.content: I am extremely frustrated with the way my AC maintenance request Ref# 3770604 has been handled. The complaint has been pending for over one month, and despite calling your customer care center repeatedly, I keep receiving the same empty response: “the case is escalated, and you will receive an update within two working days.” This has been repeated to me more than six times, yet absolutely nothing has been done.
